tier2: Amulet of Proof against Detection and Location

abandoned: A chair toppled as if left in haste
Old fire pit filled with ash
A door sealed shut by debris
Scratches on walls of unknown origin
Burn marks from an old fire
monstrous_aberrant: Walls that feel warm to the touch
monstrous_giant: Fire pit the size of a wagon
monstrous_undead: Chill mist clinging to the ground
monstrous_vermin: Tunnels too small for Medium creatures
underdark: Mushroom caps the size of trees

traps.name: Pit Trap
traps.desc: A concealed 10-foot-deep pit opens beneath the creature.

traps.name: Hidden Pit Trap
traps.desc: A camouflaged pit concealed beneath debris or cloth.

traps.name: Locking Pit Trap
traps.desc: A pit opens and iron bars slam shut overhead.

traps.name: Spiked Pit
traps.desc: A pit lined with sharp spikes at the bottom.

traps.name: Collapsing Floor
traps.desc: The floor gives way, dropping creatures into a lower chamber.

traps.name: Tripwire
traps.desc: A nearly invisible wire triggers a hidden mechanism.

traps.name: Tripwire Crossbow
traps.desc: A tripwire releases a volley of crossbow bolts.

traps.name: Tripwire Alarm
traps.desc: Triggers a loud alarm alerting nearby creatures.

traps.name: Pressure Plate
traps.desc: A weighted plate activates a hidden mechanism.

traps.name: Pressure Plate Poison Gas
traps.desc: A pressure plate releases toxic gas into the area.

traps.name: Pressure Plate Dart Trap
traps.desc: Stepping on the plate fires poisoned darts from the walls.

traps.name: Poison Dart Trap
traps.desc: Hidden darts fire from narrow wall slits.

traps.name: Poison Needle Lock
traps.desc: A trapped lock injects poison when tampered with.

traps.name: Falling Net
traps.desc: A weighted net drops from above, restraining creatures.

traps.name: Falling Block
traps.desc: A massive stone block drops from the ceiling.

traps.name: Falling Rocks
traps.desc: Loose stones cascade from above when triggered.

traps.name: Swinging Blade
traps.desc: A concealed blade swings across the corridor.

traps.name: Scything Blades
traps.desc: Multiple blades sweep back and forth through the area.

traps.name: Rolling Boulder
traps.desc: A massive boulder rolls down a passageway.

traps.name: Flame Jet
traps.desc: Jets of flame erupt from hidden nozzles.

traps.name: Burning Oil Trap
traps.desc: Oil pours into the area and ignites.

traps.name: Glyph of Warding
traps.desc: Magical runes trigger an explosive or spell effect.

traps.name: Explosive Runes
traps.desc: Runes detonate when read or disturbed.

traps.name: Symbol Trap
traps.desc: A powerful magical symbol inflicts a debilitating effect.

traps.name: Poison Gas Vent
traps.desc: Hidden vents flood the room with poisonous gas.

traps.name: Sleep Gas Trap
traps.desc: A colorless gas induces magical sleep.

traps.name: Collapsing Ceiling
traps.desc: The ceiling caves in, burying creatures in rubble.

traps.name: Cave-In
traps.desc: A triggered collapse seals exits and fills the area with debris.

traps.name: Flooding Chamber
traps.desc: Water rapidly floods the room from hidden channels.

traps.name: Rising Water Trap
traps.desc: Water fills the room steadily, threatening to drown occupants.

traps.name: Arcane Lockdown
traps.desc: Magical barriers seal doors and prevent escape.

traps.name: Teleportation Snare
traps.desc: Triggers involuntary teleportation to a nearby location.

traps.name: Lightning Conduit Floor
traps.desc: Metallic flooring discharges lightning when stepped on.

traps.name: Shock Rune
traps.desc: A rune releases a burst of electrical energy.

traps.name: Frost Jet Trap
traps.desc: Freezing air blasts from concealed vents.

traps.name: Freezing Floor
traps.desc: The floor rapidly freezes, becoming slick and numbing.

traps.name: Acid Spray Trap
traps.desc: Acid sprays from hidden wall apertures.

traps.name: Corrosive Sludge Pit
traps.desc: A false floor collapses into a pit of acidic sludge.

traps.name: Bladed Door
traps.desc: Opening the door triggers concealed blades along its frame.

traps.name: Crushing Walls
traps.desc: Walls slowly close in, threatening to crush anything inside.

traps.name: Soul Drain Sigil
traps.desc: A dark sigil siphons life energy from nearby creatures.

traps.name: Fear Glyph
traps.desc: A glyph induces supernatural terror.

traps.name: Rotating Floor
traps.desc: The floor spins, dumping creatures into adjacent hazards.

traps.name: False Staircase
traps.desc: Stairs collapse into a sliding chute.

traps.name: Summoning Trap
traps.desc: The trap summons hostile creatures when triggered.

traps.name: Alarm Sigil
traps.desc: A magical glyph alerts nearby guardians.

traps.name: Shadow Snare
traps.desc: Dark tendrils restrain creatures in dim light.

traps.name: Gravity Reversal Plate
traps.desc: Gravity briefly reverses, flinging creatures upward.
